name: KCell JSC
notes:
Kcell JSC is a leading mobile operator in Kazakhstan, providing nationwide coverage with 2G, LTE, 5G NSA, and FWA services. The company delivers voice and high-speed data services to both consumer and enterprise customers.

We are focused on improving QoE through traffic localization and direct interconnections with content providers and CDNs.

Kcell maintains a selective peering policy and is open to peering with networks delivering significant traffic volumes (typically 500 Mbps and above). We support both public and private peering and are interested in deploying embedded caching solutions within our network.
